task_objective: Modularize the monolithic frontend entry point (src/index.tsx) by extracting CSS styles, types, component declarations, helper functions, and logging wrappers into separate dedicated files, while ensuring type safety, bundle compatibility, and test suite conformance.
tests_added: Updated tests/test_frontend_static.py to use ConcatenatedFrontendPath wrapper so static analysis tests continue to validate the modularized frontend source code.
design_decisions: Extracted panel styles to src/index.css and resolved imports using a custom Rollup CSS injection plugin to inject the stylesheet dynamically into the document header at runtime.
Renamed src/types.d.ts to src/assets.d.ts to prevent name resolution conflicts with the src/types directory when compiling imports.
Centralized shared TypeScript interfaces in src/types/index.ts, and moved scroll management, fuzz matching, and DOM querying utilities to src/utils/steam.ts.
Created src/components/LogModal.tsx to house log formatting and modal rendering components.
Isolated logger wrappers into src/utils/logging.ts to eliminate monolithic helper code in index.tsx.
results: pnpm run typecheck and pnpm run build pass cleanly with no compilation or bundling warnings/errors.
All 245 backend pytest test cases pass successfully, verifying codebase-wide regression safety.
